Introducing $WAGMI – The Future of Meme Coins.
Inspired by Beeple’s iconic "WAGMICOIN" artwork, $WAGMI has emerged as a unique memecoin built on the ethos of "We’re All Gonna Make It." Combining creativity with community-driven innovation, $WAGMI aims to bring a fresh perspective to the world of cryptocurrency.

What sets $WAGMI apart is its connection to Beeple, a leading figure in the digital art world, who is now the top holder of $WAGMI. This endorsement solidifies the coin’s vision and potential to become a cultural phenomenon in the crypto space.

Join the movement as we work together to build a brighter, more inclusive future for crypto enthusiasts and innovators.

Tokenomics

Ticker: WAGMI

Total Supply: 420.69 Billion

Tax: 0%

Liquidity: 100% BURNT

Every transaction will promote the expansion of the Pnutminati, allowing more people to discover the hidden truth.

How to Buy

Step 1:
Set Up a Wallet

Download Phantom or any other wallet that supports Ethereum.

Step 2:
Add ETH to Your Wallet

Purchase ETH on major exchanges (such as Binance or Coinbase) and transfer it to your wallet.

Step 3:
Swap ETH for $WAGMI

When you look at WAGMI, WAGMI looks at you. Only the most devout explorers can solve this mystery.
